channel.title: Lens Frontier
channel.description: A place for paper notes and modest arguments around benchmarks and evaluation.

item.title: Building a Multi-Module Collaborative Evaluation Framework for T2I
item.description: An LLM-as-a-Judge evaluation system with OCR/VQA/CLIP/IQA/HP modules and cross-module calibration, breaking through single-metric benchmark limitations to capture the true capability boundaries of modern T2I models.
